Your Trusted Plumbers in Palatine

Searching for a professional plumber you can trust in Palatine? Call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to access our fully vetted network of local plumbers.

If you need a Palatine plumber, Plumbers 911 has you covered. Our plumbers are available day and night for repairs, installations and emergencies. We can connect you to local plumbers who are licensed and insured to work in your area. All of our Palatine plumbing professionals are highly trained and fully qualified to get the job done.
Call Plumbers 911 today at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to schedule an appointment or learn more about our services.

Why Hire Our Palatine Plumbers?

When you hire a Palatine plumber through Plumbers 911, you can rest assured that you'll be working with a licensed and insured professional who's been vetted. Our thorough system of researching and finding the perfect plumber in Palatine to meet your requirements saves you time and energy searching for a reliable candidate. Plumbers 911 handles all the leg work — all you need to do is give us a call. 

Prescreened, Highly Qualified Palatine Plumbers

When Plumbers 911 connects residential and commercial customers with professionals to assist with plumbing in Palatine, we take pride in the fact that our team members have been prescreened. All of our Palatine plumbing professionals are licensed, bonded and insured, and they have over 10,000 hours of training. Additionally, most of our plumbers have at least 10 years of experience, so you can rest assured your plumbing needs will be met with the highest of standards. 

Palatine Plumbing Services Overview

Whether you're dealing with an emergency sump pump situation due to an unfriendly Illinois summer storm or your pipes are frozen after the winter temps drop below zero, Plumbers 911 can help. Our Palatine plumbing experts have an extensive skill set and offer a wide range of plumbing services. 

Emergency Plumbing Services: After-hours plumbing emergencies are common, and our plumbers are on call day and night to offer assistance. Plumbers 911 can connect you with a professional who will arrive at your location as quickly as possible to tackle the issues at hand. 

Drain Cleaning: Clogged drains occur when grease, food, hair and other substances become lodged in the drainage system in kitchen sinks and showers. This can lead to your water backing up or draining slowly.  Our plumbers have the proper tools to unclog your drains, and they can investigate further with a video camera drain inspection to ensure there are no other issues at play causing your drains to malfunction. 

Hot Water Heater Repair: A sudden loss of hot water with no obvious reason or a drop in water pressure can indicate an issue with your hot water heater, such as a damaged burner assembly or sediment buildup. Let our plumbers assess the issue and get your hot water heater back in working order. 

Bathroom Remodeling: If you're planning a bathroom remodel, it's important to ensure that your plumbing is compatible with your new shower, tub or sink. Our plumbers have years of experience with repiping and fixture installations, and they can also assist with shower pan and low-flow toilet installs. Allow Plumbers 911 to connect you with a professional plumber in Palatine to assist with all of your bathroom remodeling needs. 

Check out the list below to learn about the additional services the professionals in our network offer.
